patch_description:
Root cause: The dynamic construction of ANSATZ_SPEC in the EVOLVE-BLOCK (using Python loops) can introduce subtle inconsistencies between the parameter-key ordering and how parameters are mapped during apply_ansatz_block, which may trigger SPEC_ERRORS during validation and cause the evaluation to fail. To guarantee deterministic, valid indexing and adjacency, switch to a fixed, explicit ANSATZ_SPEC that mirrors the intended seed configuration (per-qubit RY, per-qubit pre-CZ RZ, fixed CZ edges, per-qubit post-CZ RZ). This ensures the validator sees a well-formed spec with a known parameter ordering and valid gate placements.

The updated code replaces the dynamic spec generation with a static, explicit ANSATZ_SPEC that preserves the same gate layout and parameter keys, matching the working seed configuration.
